notes: SDD v2 cycle. Sprints 1-8 complete (Sprint 8 closed 2026-05-13 with 16 PRD ACs checked: aaaa-aaac, aaff-aafr). /sdd:feedback v2 feature-complete: dual-write infrastructure, inside-clone detection with 7-step path normalization, single-warn-per-session failure handling. First sprint with [FB:] tags — docs/v2-verification.md rows FB-001 (sprint 8, item 1), FB-030 (sprint 8, item 2), FB-031 (sprint 8, item 3), FB-032 (sprint 8, item 4) shipped (Verified column stays manual). New mechanics ship to disk but are not live as slash commands until plugin cache reinstall — same caveat as Sprints 5/6/7. First /sdd:plan v2 dogfood still pending reinstall. Recommended Sprint 9: Interview Command Behaviors + Context Management (aabh-aacv, ~34 ACs, biggest cross-cutting payoff, unblocks /sdd:discovery per aaaj). Alternatives: /sdd:polish re-open mechanism (aaev-aaex, 3 ACs); Multi-Session Resume (aaar-aabg, 17 ACs, two new commands /sdd:pause + /sdd:unpause); Automatic Backlog Generation (aafs-aagd, 9 ACs cross-cutting); Process Notes Growth (aage-aagn, 10 ACs cross-cutting); v1-v2 Migration (aago-aahi, 13 ACs, MIGRATION-v1-to-v2.md); v2 Release Verification (~11 ACs remaining); /sdd:retro project-close. Historical-AC backfill gap (Sprints 1-4 work shipped pre-Bug-Fix-2) remains for ACs beyond aaaa-aaac — Item 1 closed the Bug Fix 1 subset; the rest remains maintainer PRD-hygiene. Sprint 7 FB-tag gap (Sprint 7 items map to FB-017 through FB-023 but were planned without [FB:] tags) is a candidate for /sdd:polish re-open or PRD-hygiene maintenance.
